title: Diamond boron missile

The '''diamond boron missile''' was a weapon developed sometime during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], but only truly refined at the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Diamond/Legends|Diamond]] [[Boron/Legends|boron]] missiles were nearly impervious to [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]-scale laser weapons and could be fired from most standard [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers. They were equipped with powerful warheads capable of completely destroying everything within fifty meters from the point of detonation. Thus, the missile proved itself an effective weapon against fighters, since a single blast could easily take out several at a time.

==Description==
[[File:DiamondBoronMissileSchematics-EGWT.png|thumb|right|250px|Schematics for the diamond boron missile]]
The diamond boron missile was a sleek one-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] long [[Missile/Legends|projectile]] that was designed to be launched from any standard [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]], such as [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries']] [[ST2 concussion missile tube/Legends|ST2 concussion missile rack]].<ref name="EGWT" />

When launched, a diamond boron missile deployed dorsal and ventral flanges at the rear of the missile, with expandable [[Diamond/Legends|diamond]] [[Boron/Legends|boron]] [[blast plate]]s flaring out at the front of the projectile. The rear flanges gave the missile enhanced [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] maneuverability, while the forward blast plates rendered the missile virtually impervious to [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] fire.<ref name="EGWT" />

The missile had enough [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] for ten [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]] of flight time, using [[thrust-vector plate]]s within the [[exhaust nozzle]]s for exceptional maneuverability. Diamond boron missiles could reach speeds that were faster than standard missiles such as [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]].<ref name="EGWT" />

Diamond boron missiles had several detonation settings; they could be programmed to blow up when reaching a certain pre-determined location, or when their internal [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] registered a number of enemy ships in the vicinity of the blast radius. The missiles could also be guided remotely by a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]], but this method allowed the projectile to be [[Jammer/Legends|jammed]] by the enemy.<ref name="EGWT" />

While starfighter weapons were unable to stop a diamond boron missile, [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] were capable of destroying the missile. However, turbolasers had a hard time even hitting the missile due to their [[Targeting computer/Legends|targeting systems]] being unable to track a target that small.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
The diamond boron missile was developed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It took until the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil war]] for the design to be refined.<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>  During the Galactic Civil War, [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] manufactured the [[MS-15 diamond boron missile]]. However, Sienar's missile was prohibitively expensive, with each unit costing nearly twenty thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. The missile never saw widespread use due to the cost, but also because of reports of the warheads exploding while in storage. Sienar continued to produce their missile while researching more cost-effective versions.<ref name="EGWT" />

During the Galactic Civil War, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Broadside-class cruiser kdb-1|''Broadside''-class cruisers]] were initially equipped with diamond boron missiles, but later models were refitted to use concussion missiles.<ref name="EoW-Prima">[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> The [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] also often employed the missiles, which were fired from stationary [[Diamond Boron Missile Defense|space platforms]].<ref name="EoW-FoC-Prima">[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> The freighter ''[[Suprosa]]'' used a diamond boron missile to destroy four [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-Wings]] piloted by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] during the Alliance's attempt to [[Raid on the Suprosa|capture]] the ship.<ref name="EGWT" />
